Source: OpenAI Community Forum
URL: https://community.openai.com
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# OpenAI Community Forum

## Categories
- API, Announcements, Bugs, Codex, Community, GPT builders, Prompting, ChatGPT Apps SDK

## Critical Issues & Bugs (March 2026)
- GPT-5 models reportedly not adhering to system prompts
- Codex application experiencing severe slowness on Windows, even in fast mode
- Codex freezing after task completion, consuming excess tokens
- Custom MCP connectors failing to display all tools as enabled
- Text output mode broken in GPT-Realtime-1.5 when tools are active
- ChatGPT MCP connectors refreshing tokens on each tool call without session persistence
- Free token incentives not applying since March 19 UTC, users charged unexpectedly
- GPT-5.4-mini token pricing discrepancies noted (charged at 1M token groups instead of 10M)
- GPT-5.4-nano Priority Service Tier latency inconsistencies reported
- Sora-2 API experiencing limitations with 15-20 second duration requests, users reporting errors
- /images/edits endpoint rejecting gpt-image models

## API & Pricing Topics
- Web search pricing for reasoning models under discussion
- GPT-5.4-mini billing grouping discrepancy (1M vs expected 10M)
- Priority Service Tier latency issues for GPT-5.4-nano

## Feature Releases
- MCP server tools now available in ChatGPT developer mode (87 replies), marking expanded integration capabilities
- New "speed feature" for Codex CLI being tested by developers

## Community Highlights
- Users sharing success stories, including project 95% generated by Codex upon launch
- ImageGen/DALL-E megathread with 2,348 replies
- Atlas Browser feature requests (105 replies)
- Merchant integration questions for ChatGPT commerce
